title: သရဏဂုံ သုံးပါး

content.burmese: သရဏဂုံ သုံးပါး
content.translation: Taking Refuge in the Triple Gem

content.burmese: ဗုဒ္ဓံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: I take refuge in the Buddha

content.burmese: ဓမ္မံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: I take refuge in the Dhamma

content.burmese: သံဃံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: I take refuge in the Sangha

content.burmese: ဒုတိယမ္ပိ ဗုဒ္ဓံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: For the second time, I take refuge in the Buddha

content.burmese: ဒုတိယမ္ပိ ဓမ္မံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: For the second time, I take refuge in the Dhamma

content.burmese: ဒုတိယမ္ပိ သံဃံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: For the second time, I take refuge in the Sangha

content.burmese: တတိယမ္ပိ ဗုဒ္ဓံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: For the third time, I take refuge in the Buddha

content.burmese: တတိယမ္ပိ ဓမ္မံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: For the third time, I take refuge in the Dhamma

content.burmese: တတိယမ္ပိ သံဃံ သရဏံ ဂစ္ဆာမိ။
content.translation: For the third time, I take refuge in the Sangha
